query: ALTER TABLE signature_audit_log ADD COLUMN action_by INT NULL; ALTER TABLE signature_audit_log ADD COLUMN action_details TEXT NULL; ALTER TABLE signature_audit_log ADD COLUMN ip_address VARCHAR(45) NULL; ALTER TABLE signature_audit_log ADD COLUMN created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;
